title: hemitelia crenulata
intro: Hemitelia crenulata, also known as the crested polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including North America, Europe, and Asia, and is often found growing on trees and rocks. The medicinal properties of Hemitelia crenulata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
